title: StackPicks · Webstudio — open-source Webflow alternative

rows.title: Self-host the builder + site
rows.desc: Run the whole stack on your infra. No Webflow lock-in. No per-page pricing. AGPL OSS.

rows.title: Exports clean Next.js + Remix
rows.desc: Not a black box. Real React code. Edit in your IDE after. Move on with your life.

rows.title: Visual layout, real CSS variables
rows.desc: Tailwind compatible. Design tokens. Mobile-first responsive. Familiar to Figma users.

install.body: webstudio.is hosts the builder (free tier). Self-host via Docker if you want zero lock-in. Same code either way.

rows.title: Webflow wins for
rows.desc: Maturity. Plugin ecosystem. CMS at scale. 10 years of UX polish.

rows.title: Webstudio wins for
rows.desc: Cost. Ownership. Code export quality. No vendor lock-in. AGPL = always free to self-host.

rows.title: vs Framer
rows.desc: Framer is fastest for marketing pages. Webstudio is more developer-friendly + open.

take.use_if: You want Webflow's visual control but hate the pricing or vendor lock-in. Or you're a dev who wants designers to build pages without writing JSX.
take.skip_if: You need maturity. Webstudio is solid in 2026 but Webflow has a 10-year head start on edge cases.
take.sub: AGPL licensed. Maintained by webstudio-is on GitHub.

more.body: Framer · Plasmic · Builder.io · Bolt · Lovable. Curated takes.
more.sub: 11 picks · open + paid · updated this week

caption_line: Webflow alternative — open source, self-hostable, exports clean Next.js. Webstudio. Comment WEBSTUDIO for the docs ↓
